title: Create Propulsion: Simulated
description: Port of Create: Propulsion mod to NeoForge 1.21.1 with support of Sable and Create: Aeronautics
body:
Create Propulsion: Simulated

--- **Create Propulsion: Simulated** is a NeoForge addon for Minecraft 1.21.1 that brings propulsion-focused Create gameplay to the Sable + Create Aeronautics ecosystem. It adds three thruster types: - Thruster: standard fuel-based propulsion - Ion Thruster: FE-powered propulsion - Creative Thruster: configurable high-power propulsion for testing and creative builds

The mod integrates directly with Sable and Create Aeronautics contraption physics, including force-at-point behavior for proper torque and multi-thruster handling on assembled crafts.

It also includes Copycat Wings for lightweight aerodynamic building with copycat-style visual customization.

**Thrusters support fuels from these mods:** - [Create: The Factory Must Grow](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-tfmg) - [Create: Crafts & Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/createaddition) - [Create: Diesel Generators](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-diesel-generators) - [Immersive Engineering](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveengineering) - [Mekanism: Generators](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism-generators) - [Northstar: Redux](https://modrinth.com/mod/northstar-redux) - [Stellaris](https://modrinth.com/mod/stellaris) **Special thanks to:** - **PacificCyan** - Ion Thruster model, Coral Generator model - **FoxyFox909** - Multiblock Thrusters - **DeltaSF** - Original Create: Propulsion creator for 1.20.1 - **Fleugle** - Reworked thruster models/textures
